title: commiphora inaguensis
intro: Commiphora inaguensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae, native to the island of Inagua in the Bahamas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Commiphora inaguensis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Commiphora inaguensis is often used to create essential oils, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
